title: wissadula grandifolia var. brevipedunculata
intro: Wissadula grandifolia var. brevipedunculata, also known as the 'large-leaved Wissadula', is a plant species that belongs to the family Malvaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Wissadula grandifolia var. brevipedunculata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and decoctions, to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
